purpose: Allow the human team to message Lindsay and assign projects from the Agent Operations Console.

recommendedPhase1.description: Console actions create auditable local queue records first. When explicitly enabled, Lindsay receives a fire-and-forget Hermes Telegram message via hermes send.

recommendedPhase2.taskIntake: POST work-queue payloads to the Lindsay Hermes webhook endpoint with HMAC signature.
recommendedPhase2.statusReturn: Telegram response and/or callback URL to the console API.
recommendedPhase2.approvalBoundary: Lindsay may draft and summarize. Customer-facing, public, finance, legal, and policy actions require human approval.

fieldsToConfirm.taskCommand: MVP: hermes send --to telegram. Phase 2: webhook subscription route.
fieldsToConfirm.statusSource: MVP: Telegram/Hermes session history. Phase 2: callback URL.
fieldsToConfirm.auth: MVP: local filesystem permissions. Phase 2: webhook HMAC secret.

messageAction.initialBehavior: Record message draft in Agent Log.
messageAction.liveBehavior: Send internal note to Lindsay task inbox/queue with no external side effects.

assignProjectAction.initialBehavior: Create Work Queue Intake card and Agent Log receipt.
assignProjectAction.liveBehavior: Create Hermes task for Lindsay and track status back into Agent Health and Agent Log.
